Pricing

Every plan includes hosted sandbox execution and bring-your-own-key support. No hidden fees.

Hobby

For individual developers and side projects

$20/month
  • 20 tasks per day
  • 200 sandbox minutes/month
  • All AI agents
  • Bring your own key or use ours
  • Hosted sandbox execution
Get Started
Most Popular

Pro

For professional developers shipping daily

$75/month
  • 100 tasks per day
  • 1,500 sandbox minutes/month
  • All AI agents
  • Bring your own key or use ours
  • Hosted sandbox execution
  • Priority support
  • Orchestration mode
Get Pro

Business

For teams that build together (min. 3 users)

$40/user/month

Starts at $120/month for 3 users

  • 200 tasks per day per user
  • 3,000 sandbox minutes/month
  • All AI agents
  • Bring your own key or use ours
  • Hosted sandbox execution
  • Team workspaces
  • Priority support
  • Usage analytics
Get Business

Frequently asked questions

What does "bring your own key" mean?

You can use your own API keys for Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, and other providers. Your keys are encrypted and only used within your sandboxes. Alternatively, every plan includes access using our shared API quota.

What counts as a "task"?

A task is a single prompt or follow-up message sent to the AI agents. Creating a new task or continuing an existing one both count toward your daily limit.

How does Business pricing work?

Business is $40 per user per month with a minimum of 3 users ($120/month minimum). Each user gets their own task quota and sandbox allocation.

Can I cancel anytime?

Yes. You can cancel or change your plan at any time from the billing settings. Your subscription will remain active until the end of the current billing period.

What sandbox execution is included?

Every plan includes fully hosted Docker sandboxes where AI agents run your code. Sandboxes include a file editor, terminal, and live preview — all in your browser.

Ready to get started?
